Another Project Support to our University within the scope of TUBITAK 1001 Earthquake Research Call!

According to the evaluation results of ARDEB-1001 “Earthquake Research” call; Dr. Lecturer Oğuz Ersan’s project titled “The Effects of Earthquakes on Financial Decision Making” from the Department of International Trade and Finance has been entitled to be supported by TUBITAK. Prof. Oğuz Ersan’s project titled “The Effects of Earthquakes on Financial Decision Making” was entitled to be supported by TÜBİTAK.

We congratulate Oğuz and wish him success in his research.
